title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: keylime bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for keylime is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Keylime is a TPM based highly scalable remote boot attestation and runtime integrity measurement solution.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): keylime no longer supports the workaround to use TPMs with malformed EK certificate [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-111239)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
full_text:
An update for keylime is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Keylime is a TPM based highly scalable remote boot attestation and runtime integrity measurement solution.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): keylime no longer supports the workaround to use TPMs with malformed EK certificate [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-111239)
